# Q² One EVO Kit









$97.99$94.99

Discover the world of ceramic coatings with our entry-level take on traditional ceramic coatings. Q² One EVO is the perfect introduction to the world of paint coatings – with a SiO2-based formula and an extremely user-friendly application, One EVO brings high levels of candy gloss while remaining as easy to apply as natural wax.
Conveniently containing all the items you’ll need for application; this kit is perfect for those looking to install their first traditional ceramic coating or for someone trying to hone their skills. Q² One EVO is a single-layer coating that is designed for painted surfaces and can even be used on piano black & headlight/taillight plastics. One single 30ml bottle should cover a standard-size sedan – if you have a larger vehicle, the 50ml bottle will ensure coverage.

Hurry up! Sales Ends In

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/10598a69-5678-4477-b069-0e81d3888b8a/) 
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/4a597014-69e8-43ef-a3ba-b8047a712d0b/) 

# HIGH GLOSS - HIGH DURABILITY

Thanks to the nature of the SiO2 formula, Q One EVO leaves behind a thick layer of product that enhances gloss to rival that of high-quality natural waxes. Due to the nature of the thick layer it leaves behind, Q One EVO delivers great durability, improved by 50% compared to the predecessor maximizing the full 24 months with proper maintenance. With its superb water beading, Q One EVO meets all expectations of car care enthusiasts & those that might be new to ceramic coatings. No garage? No problem! All the EVO formulas have been formulated specifically to be outdoor application friendly if stable conditions can be ensured. Do not apply in direct sunlight.

# BE PREPARED - COAT SMART

Preparation is just as important as the coating itself, and Q M Prep is the perfect pre-coating degreaser for the job. After a thorough decontamination wash and paint correction are complete, spray a moderate amount of Prep onto the surface and wipe off in single straight-line motions with the included Gyeon Q M SoftWipe EVO towel. It will remove any oils remaining on the surface and leave behind a smooth, antistatic surface perfect for coating installation.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/d05b99d0-db7d-440c-8ad1-8a49d5d031e6/) 

# THE "ONE" FOR YOU

Ceramic coatings may seem intimidating, but they don t have to be and Q One EVO is a testament to that statement. With the ability to be used overtop painted surfaces, PPF, headlights/taillights, and piano black finishes, One EVO truly is the perfect entry-level coating for those looking to get acquainted with the process. The use of multiple towels helps eliminate the possibility of any high spots or streaking during the prep and coating process; this is especially important due to the thick layer of product that One EVO delivers. Now the only question that remains is this coating the One for you?
